parsed_review.summary: CP00-802 is a descriptor-only, no-runtime, no-real-data closeout pack for RP26 Enterprise SaaS Hardening (RP26.P05.M02.S15-RP26.P05.M04.S12, 40 units, risk B). The pack-level claim is supported and contains no runtime/enterprise-trust overclaim: the manifest declares production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, status=in_progress, production_ready_descriptor_verified=false, and the production_ready_flag (enterprise_saas_fixture_workflow_descriptor_verified) is an explicitly descriptor-verified flag only. Independent verification via Read/Grep/Glob confirms: (1) Identity/coverage agree across the registry binding (ENTERPRISE_SAAS_CP802_PACK_BINDING, registry.js:290), the manifest plan_binding_snapshot, the live closeout-pack-plan.json packs[CP00-802] (line 398), and the contract current_pack/latest_pack/latest_projection — same range, risk B, unit_count 40, next CP00-803/RP26.P05.M04.S13, ledger SHA 13c7ed65. The live plan DOES contain CP00-802 with matching data, so the validate-script/test manifest-snapshot fallback is not exercised. (2) ENTERPRISE_SAAS_CP802_REQUIREMENTS deliverable_counts {test:6,hermes_evidence:2,implementation:13,fixture:13,claude_review:2,security_audit:4} and micro_title_row_counts {Type:6,Primary:22,Secondary:12} match the prompt exactly; FIXTURE_GOLDEN_ROWS slices (M02=14:20→6, M03=full→22, M04=0:12→12) map exactly to the planned unit titles; validateCoverage and three model.test.js CP802 tests enforce the distributions and row counts. (3) Every case-set row is built descriptor_only=true / runtime_execution=false with raw/tenant/sso/scim/secret payload flags false plus per-row ROW_EXTRAS all-false (createCaseSet, service.js:209), and freezeResult merges the full ENTERPRISE_SAAS_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION into every descriptor/case-set/packet; validators.js validateDescriptor independently rejects any row that opens identity runtime, creates/allows cross-tenant routes, generates/exposes secrets, evaluates/writes permission decisions, writes audit events/bodies, executes UI/API, loads real tenant data, or claims enterprise trust. (4) Authority boundary holds: descriptor.authority_boundary sets claude_is_final_approval=false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true (runtime_opening_pack_id=CP00-803); claude_packet read_only=true, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, blocks_pack_on_p0_p1_p2=true. (5) Hermes is used only as a deterministic descriptor evidence packet/receipt (createEnterpriseSaasCp802HermesEvidencePacket: writes_product_state=false, emits_runtime_receipt=false; receipt_shape descriptor_only_enterprise_saas_no_write), not product runtime. (6) The committed contract promotes CP00-802 to current/latest_pack and latest_projection (EnterpriseSaasCp802FixtureWorkflowDescriptor) with prior packs CP788-CP801 preserved as historical, 15 projections, and top-level validation.valid=true/errors=[]; validateEnterpriseSaasHardeningContract and scripts/validate-rp26-enterprise-saas-hardening-contract.mjs enforce schema, RP26 program, latest pack/projection identity, mandatory artifacts, no-leak guards, capabilities, safety gates, and research alignment. (7) Local-validation evidence is clean: validation-report.json (prompt 2512<25600 bytes, no full diff/source embedded, read_tools_used and allowed, summary_only prohibited and not used, schema present, no forbidden tools, no omitted active untracked files) and readiness-report.json (ready, auth_preflight exit 0 with well-formed JSON result, no errors/warnings). (8) CP178+ hardening: pack_level_claude_review has valid_review_receipts=[] and invalid_review_attempts=[] — no prior review evidence requiring auth-failure/0-byte/malformed-JSON/fenced/tool-shaped/missing-field rejection; this review's raw-output/receipt are produced downstream. (9) index.js wildcard-re-exports the full CP802 surface; npm test includes packages/enterprise/test/*.test.js; all nine expected npm validation scripts exist in package.json; changed-file-scope active refs are the seven enterprise files with unrelated dirty files (progress-control-room, workbook docs) correctly preserved/excluded and active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted empty. One non-blocking P3: downstream closeout artifacts are not yet present, which is expected at this pre-review stage. Claude remains a read-only, non-final reviewer; final human approval for enterprise trust/runtime opening is correctly retained outside this receipt.

findings.title: Downstream closeout artifacts not yet generated (expected at pre-review stage)
findings.details: required_pack_artifacts lists manifest.json, command-evidence.json, claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json, but only manifest.json currently exists in docs/closeout-packs/cp00-802/ (artifacts/closeout-pack-claude-review/cp00-802/ likewise has no raw-output.json or review-receipt.json yet). This is consistent with a mid-closeout pack whose pack_level_claude_review.status is 'review_pending' with valid_review_receipts empty: claude-review-result.json/adjudication.md are produced by/after this very review, and command-evidence.json/construction-inspection.json are produced at closeout finalization. The immediately prior pack CP00-801 (already closed) contains all five artifacts and recorded the identical pre-review condition as a single non-blocking P3, confirming this is sequencing rather than a defect. Because these are downstream of the review, the 'adjudication' and 'inspection' inputs named in the review focus cannot be independently verified from within this receipt; the implementation, tests, contract, Hermes/Claude packets, local-validation evidence, and no-write/no-real-data boundaries were all independently verified and pass.
findings.recommendation: No action required for this review. Ensure npm run closeout-pack:validate (which enforces required_pack_artifacts) and the full validation command set (npm test, validate, weighted/fullplan/spec/goal/rp00 validators, git diff --check) are run and pass before the final CP00-802 closeout commit, so command-evidence.json, claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json are present and adjudicated prior to flipping production_ready and committing.
findings.post_review_disposition: Expected/non-blocking. Artifacts are generated by this review plus the closeout finalization step and enforced by the closeout-pack:validate gate before commit; does not block pack or goal closeout.
